Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Relates to the bonding authority of the New York city housing development corporation
Summary: Increases the maximum aggregate principal amount of the outstanding notes and bonds of the New York city housing development corporation from twenty billion dollars to twenty-two billion dollars.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the private housing finance law, in relation to increasing the bonding authority of the New York city housing development corporation
